input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.2.4
            TITLE: the charger connector(s) must incorporate a feature to let the connector become live only

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.2.4: The Charger connector(s) must incorporate a feature to let the connector become live only
EV.8.2.4 The Charger connector(s) must incorporate a feature to let the connector become live only 
when correctly connected to the Accumulator.

final_answer: The Charger connector(s) must incorporate a feature to let the connector become live only when correctly connected to the Accumulator.
